ratings.comment: Professor was very understanding. The class format was engaging even with the switch to online classes. She gives feedback instead of percentage grades to each assignment and gives an overall grade at the end. The class was paced well and not too difficult to keep up with. It is obvious that the professor actually cares about her students.

Professor Ensor was one of the most understanding professors I have ever had. I took her course online and she understood the difficulty students were having during online courses. She works very hard at what she does and always provides feedback to our work we complete in her class. I would definitely take her again.
